title: Davis Pickren Seydel and Sneed LLP ransomware incident

victim.name: Davis Pickren Seydel and Sneed LLP

extortion.description: Davis Pickren Seydel & Sneed LLP is a law firm that provides a range of legal services. Known for its expertise in environmental law, real estate, and business litigation, the firm serves a diverse clientele, including corporations, small businesses, and individuals. With a focus on personalized service, they aim to deliver effective legal solutions tailored to their clients' needs.
